# pairedRawImage

**Instance Property**

A sidecar file containing the logical `RAW` compliment of a `JPG` or other two-format image.

## Declaration

```swift
var pairedRawImage: ICCameraFile? { get }
```

## Discussion

This value contains a single-item subset of the [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICCameraFile/sidecarFiles] array.

## Identifying Related Files

- **sidecarFiles**: An array of two camera files associated with this file.
